Build A Rocket Boy:
Designed and developed **DBT** data models and **data marts** as
  analytics engineering lead, integrating 100+ source systems into a centralised
  **data lake** processing 120+ TB, enabling **self-service analytics** for data
  scientists and BI developers with **data warehouse cost optimisation** reducing
  compute spend by 30%.

Led end-to-end migration from dbt Core CLI to dbt Fusion, establishing
  **SQL**-driven **ELT pipelines** and **CI/CD pipelines** via **GitHub Actions**
  with **pytest**-driven **automated testing** suites enforcing **data quality**
  validation, reducing deployment failures by 40%.

Automated **ELT** workflows using **AWS Lambda** event-driven triggers
  and **EMR Serverless Spark** jobs with **Fivetran** connectors on
  **Terraform**-provisioned **AWS**, implementing **observability** frameworks and
   **feature drift monitoring** to power **real-time data products** reliably at
  scale.

Deployed AI use cases as **LLM**-based multi-agent workflows on an
  **Apache Iceberg** lakehouse using **DDL/DML** definitions and **MLOps** best
  practices, establishing **model deployment pipelines**, **model registry**,
  **experiment tracking**, **model versioning**, and **rollback** procedures for
  production workloads.
Architected and deployed scalable **ELT pipelines** in **DBT**, **SQL**,
  and **AWS**/**Azure** with **CDC**-based ingestion and **Apache Airflow DAG**
  orchestration, building **data marts** across capital markets trading desks,
  portfolio monitoring, settlements, and risk functions.

Collaborated with capital markets data scientists and analysts to define
  specifications for **near-real-time** **data products** from **Aurora
  PostgreSQL** transactional sources, supporting P&L reporting, **financial
  reconciliation**, mark-to-market, and VaR analysis.

Built **data governance** and rules-engine-driven **data quality** checks
   with **pytest**-automated validation suites and **observability** frameworks,
  delivering Power BI dashboards for front-office and risk stakeholders with full
  transparency into P&L and trade settlements.

Founded and scaled the **analytics engineering** function, authoring
  **data modelling** documentation and engineering standards for all **data
  warehouse** changes, providing **L3 support**, and mentoring junior developers
  on **logical data modelling** and **Python automation** best practices.

Owned the regulatory change workstream end-to-end, integrating REMIT and
  EMIR datasets into governed **data models** with full **DDL/DML** lifecycle
  management, ensuring lineage, auditability, and compliance using
  **Terraform**-managed infrastructure.
Sodexo:
Led **CDC**-based **data ingestion** for the AMETA region using **Azure
  ADF**, **Databricks**, **PySpark**, and Fivetran-style connectors, building
  **data governance** and **observability** frameworks that eliminated third-party
   tools and reduced external app costs by 80%.

Reported directly to CTO as Engineering lead, designing a fintech
  transaction **self-service analytics** platform with **data marts** and
  **real-time data products**, incorporating **operational automation** workflows
  and delivering insights across 1M+ daily user decisions.

Owned the full delivery workstream using **Agile/Scrum** ceremonies —
  standups, sprint planning, backlog refinement, and retros — delivering **data
  pipelines** with **Azure Data Factory** and **Azure Functions** with
  **observability** controls and **L3 support**.

Mentored junior developers and led **Data Vault 2.0** logical and
  physical **data modelling** implementation with rules engines for **data
  quality**, reducing data redundancy by 40% and accelerating SDLC delivery
  cycles.
Wherescape USA:
Delivered consulting engagement for British American Tobacco,
  implementing **Data Migration** scripts and **Azure Synapse** migration with
  **pytest**-driven **automated testing** suites ensuring 99.9% SLA compliance,
  with multi-cluster **Snowflake** warehouses and workload isolation.

Owned end-to-end workstream designing **Snowflake** external tables on
  **S3** for semi-structured data (**JSON**, **Parquet**) with **physical
  modelling** best practices, automating deployments via **GitHub Actions CI/CD
  pipelines** and integrating IoT/supply-chain feeds via **ELT**.

Delivered consulting engagement for AMD Malaysia, converting legacy
  **business logic** into **Python**-automated **SQL** transformations and
  building incremental **ELT pipelines** via **Agile/Scrum** methodology, loading
  1B records with 80% efficiency gain and **data marts** for downstream
  self-service consumption.
